verdict.answer_first: B states the pattern immediately: "verify → persist raw → ack fast → process async"; A starts with framing before the plan.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to the same concrete architecture in one flow: "The reliable pattern is..."; A is also decisive but adds more explanatory framing.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the ordered receive/worker/backstop steps without extra padding; A is useful but longer.
